name: @aily-project/lib-melexis-mlx90642
author: Vonweller
description: MLX90642 是 32x24 红外热成像传感器库，支持 ESP32 I2C 初始化、帧采集、像素温度、帧统计、刷新率与输出格式配置。
description_zh_cn: MLX90642 是 32x24 红外热成像传感器库，支持 ESP32 I2C 初始化、帧采集、像素温度、帧统计、刷新率与输出格式配置。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the MLX90642 32x24 infrared thermal imaging sensor, supporting ESP32 I2C initialization, frame capture, pixel temperature, frame statistics, refresh rate, and output format settings.
description_zh_hk: MLX90642 是 32x24 紅外熱成像感測器庫，支援 ESP32 I2C 初始化、影格擷取、像素溫度、影格統計、刷新率與輸出格式設定。
description_ja: Aily Blockly library for the MLX90642 32x24 infrared thermal imaging sensor, supporting ESP32 I2C initialization, frame capture, pixel temperature, frame statistics, refresh rate, and output format settings.
